## Script

Which writing system?

## Source

Where does this data come from? Cite publications/databases.

## Format

- [ ] JSON (preferred)
- [ ] CSV
- [ ] Other (describe)

## Entry Count

Approximate number of sign→reading entries.

## Confidence

How well-attested are the readings?
- [ ] Well-established (deciphered script)
- [ ] Scholarly consensus with caveats
- [ ] Speculative (undeciphered script)

## Notes

Any additional context about this dataset.
